title: Client Detector
description: A minecraft plugin that allows you to see what clients your players are using!
body:
**This was actually my first plugin! :D**

This plugin helps server owners and mods see if and what
modified minecraft clients their players are using!

## Features:
  - A command to see what client a player is using.
  - An option to include the player's client in the join message.
  - An option to block certain clients.
  - And more coming soon!

## Permissions:
(for luckperms etc. Don't forget that with op you will have all of these permissions by default)
  - clientdetector.* (Gives you every permission related to the Client Detector plugin!)
  - clientdetector.command.* (Allows you to use all Client Detector commands.)
  - clientdetector.command.client (Allows you to use the /client command.)
  - clientdetector.clientblocker.bypass (Lets you join the server even if you are using a blocked client.)
  - clientdetector.joinmessage.hide (Prevents the server from showing your client in the join message.)

## Commands:
  - /client(or /getclient) <player>
  - /clientdetector(, /cd, /clientd or /cdetector) <arg>

## Q & A:
  - Q: Does this work with ViaVersion?

  - A: Yes!

  - Q: Can this detect Geyser players?

  - A: I don't know as i can't seem to figure out how to set a geyser server up.

  - Q: What clients does this support?

  - A: All clients (that are not pretending to be vanilla) can be detected!

  - Q: Can you add Velocity support?

  - A: Velocity support may come in the future but it's likely not coming soon.

  - Q: Does this work on 1.20.2?

  - A: All releases release should work however it is currently not tested.

Don't forget that if you find bugs or have suggestions you can report them at https://github.com/Fritcha/Client-Detector/issues

I hope you enjoy :)
